rule.name: Cordova Wildcard Access Origin
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard access origin in Cordova config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard origin allows broad network access and expands attack surface.
rule.developer: Restrict access origins to explicit trusted domains.
rule.reviewer: Review config. xml access policy entries. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Cordova Wildcard Allow Navigation
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard navigation policy in Cordova config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard navigation permits untrusted content navigation.
rule.developer: Restrict navigation destinations and enforce CSP.
rule.reviewer: Validate navigation allowlist for least privilege. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Cordova Unsafe CSP Directives
rule.rule_desc: Detects weak CSP directives in Cordova web assets/config.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe directives increase XSS/script injection risk.
rule.developer: Harden CSP and avoid unsafe directives where feasible.
rule.reviewer: Audit CSP config in HTML/meta headers and templates. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Cordova Insecure HTTP Endpoint Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext endpoint references in Cordova code/config.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext traffic can expose user and session data.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS endpoints and strict transport controls.
rule.reviewer: Audit endpoint constants and plugin config values. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Cordova WebView JavaScript Bridge Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects JavaScript-native bridge usage requiring trust-boundary review.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe bridge handling can expose native capabilities to untrusted content.
rule.developer: Constrain bridge usage and validate inbound arguments.
rule.reviewer: Review plugin bridge interfaces and content trust assumptions. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Cordova Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secrets in Cordova projects.
rule.vuln_desc: Embedded secrets can be recovered from packaged app assets.
rule.developer: Use backend-managed secrets and rotate exposed values.
rule.reviewer: Validate no static production secrets are shipped. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
